/usr/bin/ar qc libharmony.a "CMakeFiles/harmony-lib.dir/src/pitch.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-lib.dir/src/frequency.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-lib.dir/src/note.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-lib.dir/src/chord.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-lib.dir/src/progression.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-lib.dir/src/structure.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-lib.dir/src/scale.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-lib.dir/src/scale_database.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/harmony-lib.dir/src/scale_query.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libharmony.a
